description: Forensic Peer Reviewer — detects hallucinated, misattributed, and misrepresented citations in scientific manuscripts

task_1.description: A citation that is completely fabricated — the paper does not exist

task_2.description: Real paper title but wrong authors and year

task_3.description: Correct citation but the manuscript claim contradicts the paper's findings

task_4.description: Real paper but the manuscript fabricates the numerical result

task_5.description: Paper shows correlation only but manuscript claims proven causation

task_6.description: Manuscript cites a real paper but cherry-picks one positive finding while omitting the main negative conclusion

task_7.description: Manuscript cites a paper with a future publication date that doesn't exist in the database yet

components.base: 0.05 — minimum for any attempt, ensures non-zero gradient
components.identification: 0.45 for correct citation, 0.15 for wrong flag, 0.0 for approve

verifiers.name: Correct Citation Flagged
verifiers.description: Agent identifies the correct problematic citation ID from the manuscript

verifiers.name: Issue Type Identified
verifiers.description: Agent's reasoning correctly identifies the TYPE of citation manipulation

verifiers.name: Evidence-Based Reasoning
verifiers.description: Agent provides specific evidence from the database search to justify the flag
